action_set_definitions.name: get_system_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time telemetry from the pipeline system, including pressure, flow rates, and alarm statuses.

action_set_definitions.name: get_acoustic_wave_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-resolution timestamps of the pressure wave arrival at Station Alpha and Station Beta to facilitate leak localization.

action_set_definitions.name: list_pipeline_valves
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all Mainline Block Valves (MLBVs) between Station Alpha and Station Beta, including their names and precise Kilometer Post (KP) locations.

action_set_definitions.name: set_valve_state
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a specific pipeline valve to a target state (OPEN or CLOSED).

valve_id.description: The unique identifier for the valve.

target_state.description: The desired state of the valve.

state_description.system_pressure_psi: Current pressure in the pipeline measured in Pounds per Square Inch.
state_description.flow_rate_m3h: Current fluid flow rate in cubic meters per hour.
state_description.main_valve_status: The opening percentage of the main control valve (0-100).
state_description.pump_rpm: Current revolutions per minute of the primary delivery pump.
state_description.safety_vent_active: Indicates if the emergency pressure relief vent is currently open.
